meta.description: Daily: read the company's compliance gates via MCP; if any are still open/in_progress, post a reminder to the notify channel. Read-only. Scoped identity wf:compliance-gate-nag -> [compliance.gates, llm.summarize]; the platform gates the read to company_admin (the service account is granted that role). Env: HUB_SERVICE_TOKEN, AGENCY_TENANT_ID, NOTIFY_WEBHOOK_URL.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id: 1, method: "tools/call", params: { name: "compliance.gates", arguments: { tenantId: $env.AGENCY_TENANT_ID } } }) }}
